schema_note: Operational Lane A register (not a frozen kernel schema expansion). Fields follow L1_PARALLEL_LANES.md catalog template plus Component-First Acquisition target components.

exact_vehicle_silo.locked_configuration: 2019 Ford F-450 Chassis Cab Regular Cab 4x2 DRW 145.3 WB / 60 CA

component_first_acquisition.rule: Hard Rule 0 corollary + Hard Rule 11 — Evidence Acquisition Efficiency
component_first_acquisition.preference: Evaluate exact complete-vehicle assets first when discovered; otherwise acquire component-by-component. Never forbid complete-vehicle search.
component_first_acquisition.admission_rule: Candidate assets do not enter the exact-vehicle silo until Hard Rule 4 lifecycle + HR-EVI verification; similarity and generation match are discovery-only.

rejection_reason: Redundant with RESEARCH_LOG, this catalog, per-asset evaluation/audit, HR-EVI + cross-vehicle-comparison schema, L1 gap matrix, and REFERENCE_ACQUISITION_QUEUE / STATUS. Example marketplace URLs in the proposal are not admitted (Hard Rule 6).
